title: PayPal Q2 2021 Earnings: Mixed Results
text: PayPal reported earnings per share of $1.15, exceeding the $1.12 expected. However, revenue came in at $6.24 billion versus $6.27 billion expected. Net profit dropped 23% from a year earlier to $1.18 billion. Added 11.4 million net new active accounts for total of 403 million. Revenue grew 19% year over year. For Q3, PayPal guided for adjusted earnings of $1.07 per share on revenue between $6.15-$6.25 billion.
